reference: Hi, you had an injury below your knee due to direct collision, with a bruise and difficulty in walking. You have done the right thing by applying ice on it. I believe that it is a blunt injury to the leg causing a local hematoma. I would suggest hot fomentation, painkillers, and local support for ten days, and if there is no relief, then proceed for X-rays.
text: thigh. You had an injury below your knee due to direct collision, with a bruise and difficulty in walking. You have done the right thing by applying ice on it.
